deploy.startCommand: node -e "const net=require('net');const u=new URL(process.env.DATABASE_URL);const s=net.createConnection({host:u.hostname,port:u.port||5432},()=>{console.log('>>> TCP CONNECT OK to '+u.hostname+':'+u.port);s.end();process.exit(0)});s.on('error',e=>{console.log('>>> TCP CONNECT ERROR: '+e.message);process.exit(1)});setTimeout(()=>{console.log('>>> TCP CONNECT TIMEOUT after 10s');process.exit(1)},10000)"; echo ">>> tcp test exit code $?" && echo '>>> running migrations' && npx prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma && echo '>>> migrations done, starting node' && node dist/index.js; echo ">>> process exited with code $?"
